get.summary: Retrieve a channel by its channel id
get.description: Get a channelDTO object by specifying its channel id

parameters.name: channelId
parameters.description: Name of channel to be searched

parameters.name: maxVideos
parameters.description: Maximum number of videos to be searched

parameters.name: maxComments
parameters.description: Maximum number of comments per video to be searched

Channel example.description: This example provides the representation of a valid response

videos.name: Alien: Isolation live on iOS - 1/9/2023, 10:17:06 PM
videos.description: HOW WILL YOU SURVIVE? Discover the true meaning of fear in Alien: Isolation, a survival horror set in an atmosphere of constant dread and mortal danger.

post.summary: Save a channel by its channel id
post.description: Post a channelDTO object to VideoMiner by specifying its channel id

parameters.name: channelId
parameters.description: Name of channel to be created

parameters.name: maxVideos
parameters.description: Maximum number of videos to be included

parameters.name: maxComments
parameters.description: Maximum number of comments per video to be included

500.description: The sent channel object  was incorrectly formed. Usually caused by a non existing channel name
